response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the potential for misinformation and to verify the accuracy of information before sharing it. This can be done by fact-checking sources and consulting reputable news organizations. Additionally, using privacy settings on social media platforms can help limit the spread of false information. It is also important to be mindful of the language used when discussing sensitive topics online, as it can contribute to a toxic online environment. By being informed and responsible in our use of social media, we can help create a safer and more respectful online community.

This can be done by fact-checking sources and consulting reputable news organizations. Additionally, using privacy settings on social media platforms can help limit the spread of false information. It is also important to be mindful of the language used when discussing sensitive topics online, as it can contribute to a toxic online environment. By being informed and responsible in our use of social media, we can help create a safer and more respectful online community.
